mapper.select: SELECT m.id, m.conversation_id, m.sender_id, m.content, m.type, m.status, m.created_at, u.id as sender_user_id, u.username as sender_username, u.nickname as sender_nickname, u.avatar_url as sender_avatar_url FROM messages m INNER JOIN users u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE m.id = #{id}

SELECT m.id, m.conversation_id, m.sender_id, m.content, m.type, m.status, m.created_at, u.id as sender_user_id, u.username as sender_username, u.nickname as sender_nickname, u.avatar_url as sender_avatar_url FROM messages m INNER JOIN users u ON m.sender_id = u.id WHERE m.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND m.status = 1 ORDER BY m.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM messages WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND status = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO messages (conversation_id, sender_id, content, type, status) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{senderId}, #{content}, #{type}, #{status})
